title: It's almost cabaret time again in Great Brak
description: GREAT BRAK NEWS - It will be cabaret time in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GREAT BRAK NEWS - It will be cabaret time in Great Brak soon.","html":"GREAT BRAK NEWS - It will be cabaret time in Great Brak soon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each year a cabaret is held in the town to raise funds for charities.","html":"Each year a cabaret is held in the town to raise funds for charities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year cabaret fans can look forward to the Night of the Suiderkruis Stars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets can be bought at https://tinyurl. com/GBC-2025.","html":"Tickets can be bought at https://tinyurl. com/GBC-2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cabaret takes place at De Dekke Restaurant on 29 and 30 May and the organisers promise unforgettable nights in support of two vital causes: CAWS 4 PAWS animal welfare charity and the Child Welfare SA Great Brak branch.","html":"The cabaret takes place at De Dekke Restaurant on 29 and 30 May and the organisers promise unforgettable nights in support of two vital causes: CAWS 4 PAWS animal welfare charity and the Child Welfare SA Great Brak branch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This year’s theme, Night of the Suiderkruis Stars, promises glitter, glamour and goosebumps as local legends and exciting newcomers light up the stage,\" the organisers say.","html":"\"This year’s theme, Night of the Suiderkruis Stars, promises glitter, glamour and goosebumps as local legends and exciting newcomers light up the stage,\" the organisers say."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 2025 line-up:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Jannie Moolman – our headliner with a voice as big as the night sky. • Zanah-Lee Stanley – back by popular demand. • Anton Bouwer – that deep, beautiful bass you won’t forget. • Will Lass and Breyten Treurnicht – fresh talent with star power. • Franco Engelbrecht and band – with Jewlin Jonkers on drums and Eckardt Muller on bass. \"This will all be directed (and voiced) by the fabulous Petronel Baard,\" say the organisers.","html":"• Jannie Moolman – our headliner with a voice as big as the night sky. • Zanah-Lee Stanley – back by popular demand. • Anton Bouwer – that deep, beautiful bass you won’t forget. • Will Lass and Breyten Treurnicht – fresh talent with star power. • Franco Engelbrecht and band – with Jewlin Jonkers on drums and Eckardt Muller on bass. \"This will all be directed (and voiced) by the fabulous Petronel Baard,\" say the organisers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The fun and flair of the community performers:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Lirian Alencar-Marx brings the fire with her Latin Fusion. • Lirian & The Grannies (Lettie Swanepoel & Cesserien Booyens) will have you in stitches. • The fabulous Stardust Ladies will dazzle with their dancing. • Elvis (Feff Gericke) and Marilyn (Wendy Malan) make a glamorous comeback. • Local legend Dave Robbins brings the laughs with The Old Man in Black . • And more surprise acts to keep you on your toes.","html":"• Lirian Alencar-Marx brings the fire with her Latin Fusion. • Lirian & The Grannies (Lettie Swanepoel & Cesserien Booyens) will have you in stitches. • The fabulous Stardust Ladies will dazzle with their dancing. • Elvis (Feff Gericke) and Marilyn (Wendy Malan) make a glamorous comeback. • Local legend Dave Robbins brings the laughs with The Old Man in Black . • And more surprise acts to keep you on your toes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Last year’s opening night sold out fast, so don’t miss out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year, you can choose your seats when booking. Want a full table for your group?","html":"This year, you can choose your seats when booking. Want a full table for your group?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’ve got you covered with multiple table sizes. Doors open at 17:00 and the show starts at 19:00.","html":"We’ve got you covered with multiple table sizes. Doors open at 17:00 and the show starts at 19:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"De Dekke will be offering dinner specials. Information will be given to ticket holders.","html":"De Dekke will be offering dinner specials. Information will be given to ticket holders."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Dress to dazzle: think feathers, sequins, stars … under the Suiderkruis; anything fabulous goes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For booking information: WhatsApp: 072 8199 746 (no calls), email: thegreatbrak [email protected] and stay updated by following the Facebook page, Great Brak Cabaret.","html":"For booking information: WhatsApp: 072 8199 746 (no calls), email: thegreatbrak [email protected] and stay updated by following the Facebook page, Great Brak Cabaret."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: It's almost cabaret time again in Great Brak
